findings.description: The source includes a concrete log output example showing how tags appear in actual metrics output (e.g., `process.start.time{bar=BAR,foo=FOO} value=444224h 29m 38.875000064s`), along with the confirmation sentence "全てのメトリクスに、foo=FOO, bar=BAR のタグが設定されていることが確認できる。" This output example demonstrates the expected format of tagged metrics and is omitted from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence:
.. code-block:: text

  2020-09-04 17:30:06.656 [INFO ]      i.m.c.i.l.LoggingMeterRegistry: process.start.time{bar=BAR,foo=FOO} value=444224h 29m 38.875000064s
  ...

全てのメトリクスに、``foo=FOO``, ``bar=BAR`` のタグが設定されていることが確認できる。

findings.description: `LoggingMeterRegistryFactory` is a PascalCase class name used in the XML configuration example within s2 but is absent from the s2 hints array.
